column1: # Full project trajectory: completed phases plus the path to the Monday.com
# Cancellations Return Tracking migration and Inventory Management integration.

column3: Type

column2: Modern Power App for driver onboarding, contract management, deductions, testing compliance, and document generation. Consolidates Monday.com's Cancellations Return Tracking board into a single tool and wires the return workflow into the Inventory Management App.
column3: Feature
Description
Stakeholder interviews and initial data model for driver onboarding
Six-step wizard covering setup
English Language Proficiency test trigger and automated scoring with pass/fail routing
Quick-generate PDFs and email drafts for start-up
Moved Rider Permit tooling out of Monday.com into DIX with live PDF generation and history
Presence pill in the header and first-run walkthrough for new users
First production release plus post-launch polish and deploy reliability work
Scoring flows and UI badges for Hazmat and Homeland Security tests
Re-enable the Cancellations screens currently hidden behind Coming Soon badges
Pull the Monday.com Cancellations Return Tracking workflow into DIX so returns live alongside cancellation records
Connect DIX cancellation returns to the Inventory Management App so returned items move through inventory automatically
Parallel-run validation then retire the Monday.com board
Description
Capture the onboarding pain points to replace and the KPIs to preserve

column2: Seed terminal config for all 50+ terminals
column3: Baseline agent data so deduction rates, contacts, and company info are live from day one

column2: Ship wizard shell with progress bar
column3: Horizontal step indicator, scaled current step, green checkmarks on completed steps
Each Next click persists the record so nothing is lost mid-flow
License, address, contract type, fuel card, vendor, and unit capture
Toggle deductions and see weekly / monthly / one-time totals update in real time

column2: Wire ELP toggle and request flow
column3: Sending a test from the wizard drops a Forms link into the driver's inbox

column2: Automated scoring and pass / fail routing
column3: Driver pass emails recruiter; fail emails management with the result PDF attached
Toggle locks to Sent / Passed / Failed once the driver has taken the test
Lease Agreement, Agent Confirmation, Fleet Commitment, Road Test, Welcome Letter
Deductions Checklist, IRP Lease, Truck Box Forms
CN Registration, CP Registration, FastPass ID, SeaLink Entry
One click creates the Front draft with all driver info pre-filled
Removes the old manual Monday.com entry and makes rate selection instant
Two-page permit PDF, last 100 permits searchable with per-row re-download
See who else is working in DIX right now with colored initials and a live count

column2: Nine-page welcome tour for first-time users
column3: Logo splash plus eight feature clips covering setup, progressive save, testing, deductions, review, search, and quick forms
App live for the processing team
No more hardcoded names - Header, Dashboard greeting, CP Letter, Intent of Lease, and Truck Box all show the signed-in user

column2: SeaLink signature swap to Alberto Florez
column3: Replaces the old approval signature on page 1 of the SeaLink PDF

column2: Error boundary around Search Records View
column3: Surfaces the real error instead of a blank screen and catches the stale formatDate crash
Real unit numbers, terminal filter, and a Search By dropdown for better triage
Tighten the release process so future versions ship without URL churn
Same pattern as ELP: Forms submission scores automatically and updates the driver record
Runs alongside Hazmat off the same trigger so one submission drives both results

Walk through create / edit / view, confirm approvals and deduction dates behave
Document every column, status, and automation on Cancellations Return Tracking so nothing gets lost in translation
Return status, items to return, return date, condition notes, and agent confirmation live alongside the cancellation record

Items-to-return checklist, status chips, agent confirmation step, and per-agent filtering

column3: Agree on the fields and identifiers both apps will share for driver returns
Confirming a return in DIX creates or updates the matching inventory record automatically
Inventory marks an item as received and DIX flips the cancellation to Returned and Received with no manual step
